steps.title: Separate dependent from main clause
steps.content: The clause beginning with While is dependent and cannot stand alone. It introduces the independent clause about aerobic and anaerobic respiration.

steps.title: Use the introductory comma
steps.content: A provides no punctuation, B turns the dependent clause into a fragment, and D incorrectly uses a semicolon after a dependent clause. The matching choice places a comma after the introductory dependent clause. The answer is C.
